title: Hypixel Skyblock | High Contrast
description: A high contrast resourcepack for Hypixel Skyblock. Supports almost every skyblock mods!
body:
# Hypixel Skyblock High Contrast resourcepack

## Currently supports:

- Some of the base game textures
- [Skyblocker](<https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap>)
- [Skyblock Tweaks](<https://modrinth.com/mod/sbt>)
- [Skyblock PV](<https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-profile-viewer>)
- [Firmament](<https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament>)
- [REI](<https://modrinth.com/mod/rei>)

>More coming *soon™*

## Color pallete

|Color     |HEX     |
|----------|--------|
|Black     |000000  |
|Gray      |1F1F1F  |
|Blue      |0057E9  |
|Green     |87E911  |
|Red-ish   |E11845  |
|Dark Gold |F2CA19  |
